title: Find My Device - Allow Once - IOS [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device feature in Poly Studio Mobile app shows location permission popup with Allow Once, Allow while using app, and Don't allow options
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset connected.
2. From the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon).
4. When the location permission popup appears, tap "Allow Once".
5. Tap the back button to return to the previous screen.
expected: After step 3, a location permission popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't allow". After step 4, Location and Geo icons become visible on the Find My Device screen.
